expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子所需的板材尺寸。 [Width], [Height],[Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板材料的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板材料的厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คืความหนาของแผ่นไม้มุมบน ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày ván của mặt trên, mặt dưới và bên hông, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày ván nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal sa Likas na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက် ပိုင်းခြမ်းဖက်အတိုင်းအတာများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။[Width],[Height],[Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှု,[BoardThick] သည် ထိပ်,အောက်ခြေ နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်တင်ဆက်မှုအထူ,[BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်တင်ဆက်မှုအထူဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជារង្វាស់សរុប [BoardThick] គឺជាប្រវែងធំ ស្តើង និងក្រាស់នៃសាច់ល្ដាង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាប្រវែងនៃសាច់ល្ដាងខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດສານສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະຫນາດທັງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາສຳ ລັບທັອບ, ກ້ອນລົງລຸ່ມແລະຂ້າງ [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາສຳ ລັບແຜ່ນທ້າຍ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用のボードサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は合計寸法、[BoardThick]はトップ、ボトム、サイドボードの材質の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]はバックボード材質の厚さです。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 사이드 보드 재료 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 백 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medición total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Bretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke des Rückbretts. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой панелей, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
